ksa_text: Ability to align strategic business objectives, technology capabilities, and operational priorities to establish coherent organizational direction.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the ability contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('align strategic business technology capabilit'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4626, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
